conversation_id.description: Caller-supplied stable identifier linking all turns in this conversation. Declared as the primary canonical_name_fields rule so distinct sessions never heuristically merge via `title`.

title.description: Descriptive conversation title. NOT an identity field; use `conversation_id` for resolution.

client_name.description: Client or harness name that supplied this conversation context.

harness.description: Agent harness name, when distinct from the client label.

workspace_kind.description: Coarse workspace kind such as git_repository or plain_directory.

repository_name.description: Bounded repository/project name supplied by the host.

repository_root.description: Repository root path supplied by the host. Optional context only; not an identity field.

repository_remote.description: Repository remote URL or label supplied by the host. Optional context only; not an identity field.

scope_summary.description: Short human summary of the bounded session scope.
